raw.population: Children; N: 118 (Egyptian) Age: 10.6±4.8 WT: Adults; N: 184 (Egyptian) Age: 29.4±9.9 WT: 55.3±19.7
raw.objective: “This might help in individualization of CBZ dosage regimen.”
raw.covariates: Tested: WT, age, comedications Included: None
raw.observations: Fixed value of Vd, and Ka for different formulations (syrup and controlled release formulation tablets). Dose adjusted by total body weight. Large described but unexplained variability.
raw.equations: CL/F=theta1*(1+eta1) Vd/F=theta2 If suspension formulation Ka=theta3, if continuous release Ka=theta4 F=0.85 Cobs=Cipred*(1+eps1)
raw.parameter_values: theta1=3.51 theta2=71.5 theta3=0.65 theta4=0.2 omega1=0.667 sigma1=0.28

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
